tasks.label: Build All
tasks.detail: Build Chrome and Firefox extensions into dist/

tasks.label: Build Chrome
tasks.command: node -e "const b=require('./build.js');" 2>/dev/null; node build.js && echo '(both built — load from dist/chrome/)'

tasks.label: Build Firefox
tasks.command: node -e "const b=require('./build.js');" 2>/dev/null; node build.js && echo '(both built — load from dist/firefox/)'

tasks.label: Deploy to Chrome
tasks.command: node build.js && echo '\n✓ Ready: open chrome://extensions → Load unpacked → select dist/chrome/'
tasks.detail: Build and show instructions to load in Chrome

tasks.label: Deploy to Firefox
tasks.command: node build.js && echo '\n✓ Ready: open about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox → Load Temporary Add-on → select dist/firefox/manifest.json'
tasks.detail: Build and show instructions to load in Firefox

tasks.label: Launch Firefox with Extension
tasks.command: node build.js firefox && npx web-ext run --source-dir dist/firefox/ --start-url https://suno.com
tasks.detail: Build and launch Firefox with the extension loaded via web-ext

tasks.label: Package Firefox XPI
tasks.command: node build.js firefox && npx web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox/ --artifacts-dir dist/artifacts/firefox/ --overwrite-dest
tasks.detail: Build and package Firefox extension as .xpi in dist/artifacts/firefox/

tasks.label: Package Chrome ZIP
tasks.command: node build.js chrome && mkdir -p dist/artifacts/chrome && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../artifacts/chrome/bettersuno-chrome.zip . && echo '\n✓ Packaged → dist/artifacts/chrome/bettersuno-chrome.zip'
tasks.detail: Build and package Chrome extension as .zip for Chrome Web Store

tasks.label: Build & Sign Firefox
tasks.command: node build.js firefox && npx web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox/ --artifacts-dir dist/artifacts/firefox/ --channel unlisted --api-key ${input:amoApiKey} --api-secret ${input:amoApiSecret}
tasks.detail: Build, sign and package Firefox extension via AMO API
